name: botster
description: Botster agent integration with MCP server configuration and workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Connect agents to the local Botster hub.
interface.longDescription: Installs the Botster MCP server configuration and gives agents focused Botster skills for first-agent setup, TUI customization, hub behavior, Botster plugin customization, and MCP tool authoring.
defaultPrompt: List active Botster hubs and agents.
